_sentiment_note: Disabled Mar 12 2026 — 11 trades 27.3% WR net negative vs 32.3% without

tiers._note: v2.1.4: Rescaled for expanded scorer (max ~110pts). A+>=80, A>=68, B>=55, C<55

advanced._rr_note: v2.1.4: atr_tgt raised 5.0->7.0 so RR=2.8, passes min_rr=2.5

session_thresholds._note: v2.1.6: OVERLAP blocked(999,0%WR). ASIAN blocked(999,25.8%WR,31trades below breakeven). LATE_US=60(23.1%WR). EUROPEAN=50(29.4%WR). US=50(50%WR).

pair_limits._note: GBPUSD(56%WR,max5,BUY-only), GBPJPY(33.7%WR,max1), EURGBP(0%WR,blocked), EURUSD(US-session-only,min65,max2), AUDUSD(US-session-only,min65,max2), USDCAD(US-session-only,min65), USDCHF(US-session-only,min65), USDJPY(US-session-only,min65), NZDUSD(25%WR,max1,US-session-only,min65)

GBPUSD.reason: GBPUSD SELL 0/3 wins (-49.7 pips), BUY 2/2 wins (+90.9 pips) in v2.1.4

directional_filters._note: Block specific directions for pairs with strong directional bias.

session_expiry_minutes._note: Data-driven: EUROPEAN(37.5%WR,+380p) and US(54.8%WR,+602p) extended to 4h. ASIAN/LATE_US/OVERLAP kept at 15min — thin liquidity, poor WR.

usd_pair_rules._note: USD pairs US-session-only (47.2% WR). Min score 65 vs default 55/58 — USD is macro-driven, higher conviction required. Wider news blackout -45/+30min — NFP/CPI disruption persists longer than EUR/GBP events. Research: BIS 2025 (USD in 89% trades), ClearEdge (60-90s post-NFP random), OANDA session analysis. GBPUSD excluded — GBP is primary driver, 56% WR unrestricted.

sentiment._note: These values are now READ by the code in v2.1.5-FINBERT
sentiment._setup: Requires GitHub secrets: HF_API_KEY, NEWSAPI_KEY, MARKETAUX_API_KEY. Then set use_sentiment: true above.

_optimisation_note: v2.1.6 changes (data-driven, 110 resolved trades): 1) Aggressive threshold 50->58 — Tier C signals (50-54) losing -134 pips. 2) GBPJPY cap 2->1 — 85 trades at 34.1% WR dominating pool, dragging overall WR. 3) LATE_US threshold 55->60 — 25% WR/-94 pips, aligned with ASIAN thin-liquidity level.

economic_calendar._note: Forex Factory high-impact event blackout. Plain HTTP — no Browserless tokens used. Default: -30min/+15min. USD restricted pairs: -45min/+30min.

live_price_validation._note: X-Rates live price via Browserless. Requires BROWSERLESS_TOKEN secret. Free tier = 1000 tokens/month.
